title: Job Opening Teacher at Ratna Sagar

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Ratna Sagar
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!
